PRESENT BUT DEFT NOT PRESENT. JURY HAS REACHED A VERDICT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT, VERDICT READ INTO THE RECORD. JURY POLLED AT PLTF'S REQUEST, VERDICT UNANIMOUS. JURY DISCHARGED,THANKED AND EXCUSED AND REMAINDER OF JURY DUTY EXCUSED BY COURT. ALL EXHIBITS RETURNED TO BOTH COUNSEL, INCLUDING DEPOSITIONS. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
